privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how 1on1 ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal data when you use our platform at app.1on1.surcod.ro and related services.

dataWeCollect.title: 1. Data We Collect
dataWeCollect.account: Account data: name, email address, company name, role, and organization type when you register.
dataWeCollect.session: Session data: meeting notes, answers to session questions, action items, talking points, and private notes created during 1:1 meetings.
dataWeCollect.ai: AI-processed data: session content is sent to our AI provider (Anthropic Claude) for generating summaries, sentiment analysis, and action item suggestions. We do not use your data to train AI models.
dataWeCollect.calendar: Calendar data: if you connect Google Calendar, we access event titles, times, and participant emails to sync meeting schedules. We store OAuth tokens securely.
dataWeCollect.usage: Usage data: pages visited, features used, browser type, IP address, and device information for analytics and service improvement.
dataWeCollect.cookies: Cookies: authentication session cookies (HTTP-only, secure), locale preference cookie (NEXT_LOCALE), and theme preference.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.item1: To provide and operate the 1on1 meeting management platform
howWeUse.item2: To generate AI-powered session summaries, sentiment analysis, and coaching suggestions
howWeUse.item3: To sync meeting schedules with your calendar provider
howWeUse.item4: To send transactional emails (invitations, password resets, session reminders)
howWeUse.item5: To compute analytics dashboards (team health scores, action item completion rates)
howWeUse.item6: To enforce role-based access controls and tenant isolation

dataProtection.title: 3. Data Protection
dataProtection.encryption: Encryption: private meeting notes are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM with per-tenant keys derived via HKDF. All data in transit is encrypted via TLS 1.3.
dataProtection.isolation: Tenant isolation: every database query is scoped to your organization's tenant ID. PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS) provides a secondary enforcement layer.
dataProtection.access: Access control: three-tier RBAC (admin, manager, member) ensures users can only access data relevant to their role and reporting relationships.

thirdParties.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdParties.intro: We share data with the following processors, solely to provide the service:
thirdParties.neon: Neon — managed PostgreSQL database (EU region available)
thirdParties.anthropic: Anthropic — AI analysis of session content (summaries, sentiment, suggestions)
thirdParties.google: Google — OAuth authentication and Calendar API (only if you connect)

dataRetention.title: 5. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. When you delete your account or your organization is removed, all associated data (sessions, notes, action items, analytics) is permanently deleted within 30 days. AI-generated summaries are deleted alongside their source sessions.
dataRetention.calendar: Calendar OAuth tokens are revoked and deleted immediately when you disconnect your calendar.

gdpr.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
gdpr.intro: If you are in the European Economic Area, you have the right to:
gdpr.port: Export your data in a portable format
gdpr.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@surcod.ro. We will respond within 30 days.

selfHost.title: 7. Self-Hosting
selfHost.content: 1on1 is open source (AGPL v3). If you self-host the platform, you are the data controller and this privacy policy does not apply to your instance. You are responsible for your own data protection compliance.

changes.title: 8. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated via email or an in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the 1on1 platform operated by Surcod SRL ("we", "us", "our"). By creating an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms.

service.title: 1. The Service
service.content: 1on1 is a meeting management platform for structured one-on-one sessions between managers and direct reports. The service includes meeting templates, session tracking, AI-powered insights, action item management, analytics, and calendar integration.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts and Access
accounts.item1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account.
accounts.item2: The person who registers an organization becomes the initial admin and is responsible for managing users and billing.
accounts.item3: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.
accounts.item4: You must not share accounts between multiple individuals.

plans.title: 3. Plans and Billing
plans.free: The Free plan includes up to 5 users with basic features at no charge.
plans.paid: Paid plans (Pro, Enterprise) are billed per user per month. Prices are listed on our pricing page and may change with 30 days notice.
plans.trial: Free trials, when offered, convert to the selected paid plan at the end of the trial period unless cancelled.
plans.refunds: We do not offer refunds for partial billing periods. You may cancel at any time, and access continues until the end of the current billing period.

acceptable.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptable.item1: Use the service for any unlawful purpose
acceptable.item2: Attempt to access data belonging to other organizations
acceptable.item3: Reverse engineer, decompile, or extract source code from the hosted service (the open-source codebase is available separately under AGPL v3)
acceptable.item4: Use automated tools to scrape or overload the service
acceptable.item5: Upload malicious content or attempt to exploit vulnerabilities

data.title: 5. Your Data
data.ownership: You retain ownership of all content you create on the platform (session notes, action items, templates, etc.).
data.license: You grant us a limited license to process your content solely to provide the service, including AI analysis features you opt into.
data.export: You may export your data at any time through the platform or by contacting support.
data.deletion: Upon account deletion, your data is permanently removed within 30 days as described in our Privacy Policy.

ai.title: 6. AI Features
ai.content: Our AI features (session summaries, sentiment analysis, action item suggestions) are provided as assistance tools and should not be treated as professional advice. AI outputs may be inaccurate. You are responsible for reviewing and acting on AI suggestions at your discretion.
ai.noTraining: We do not use your data to train AI models. Session content is sent to Anthropic's Claude API for real-time processing only.

openSource.title: 7. Open Source
openSource.content: The 1on1 platform source code is available under the GNU Affero General Public License v3 (AGPL v3) at github.com/aibaza/1on1. The hosted service at app.1on1.surcod.ro includes additional infrastructure, support, and managed services not covered by the open-source license.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

termination.title: 9. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access if you violate these Terms. You may terminate your account at any time through your account settings. Upon termination, your rights to use the service cease immediately, and data deletion follows the schedule in our Privacy Policy.

changes.title: 10. Changes to These Terms
changes.content: We may modify these Terms at any time. We will notify you of material changes via email or in-app notification at least 30 days before they take effect. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

governing.title: 11. Governing Law
governing.content: These Terms are governed by the laws of Romania. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Bucharest, Romania.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.content: For questions about these Terms: legal@surcod.ro

security.title: Security at 1on1
security.subtitle: Our commitment to protecting your team's most sensitive conversations. We build with a security-first mindset to ensure your data remains yours alone.

encryption.title: End-to-end encryption
encryption.description: AES-256-GCM encryption for all private notes, ensuring only meeting participants can read them.

isolation.title: Tenant isolation
isolation.description: Row-level security (RLS) at the database layer prevents any cross-tenant data leakage.

rbac.title: Role-based access
rbac.description: Granular RBAC controls to manage exactly who can view, edit, or delete meeting records.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: Full code auditability and self-hosting options for organizations requiring maximum sovereignty.

details.title: Deep Technical Safeguards
details.subtitle: We maintain rigorous engineering standards across our entire infrastructure to protect your operational integrity.
details.encryptionText: All private notes are encrypted using AES-256-GCM with per-tenant keys derived via HKDF. In-transit data is protected by TLS 1.3, ensuring secure connections between your browser and our servers.
details.multiTenancyText: Every database table with tenant data includes tenant_id. PostgreSQL Row-Level Security policies enforce isolation at the database level as a safety net beyond application-level filtering.
details.authText: Powered by Auth.js v5 with JWT strategy. Supports Google OAuth, Microsoft OAuth, and email/password with bcrypt hashing. Session cookies are HTTP-only, Secure, and SameSite=Strict.
details.authzText: Three roles — admin, manager, member. Resource-level checks verify the user is actually the manager or report on a given series/session, not just the right role.
details.aiText: Session content sent to Anthropic Claude API for summaries and suggestions. We do not use customer data to train AI models. AI processing happens in real-time only — zero data retention by the AI provider.
details.infraSubtitle: Global performance without compromising regional security requirements.

compliance.title: Compliance & Privacy
compliance.gdprText: Full support for data portability (export), right to erasure (deletion), and ready-to-sign Data Processing Agreements (DPA).
compliance.residencyText: Host your data in EU regions. We prioritize local data residency requirements for enterprise customers.
compliance.cookieText: We only use essential cookies necessary for the platform to function — authentication session and locale preference. No marketing trackers.
compliance.selfHostText: Enterprise tier includes Docker deployment for organizations requiring complete physical sovereignty over their meeting data.

disclosure.title: Responsible Disclosure
disclosure.text: We value the security community. If you've discovered a vulnerability, please report it to us immediately. We commit to a rapid response.

cta.title: Questions about security?
cta.subtitle: Our team is ready to provide the technical documentation your IT department needs.
